summary: Confirmed and fixed 2 cmd-domain runtime bugs: goyoke-scout now honors stdin-scoped file lists, and goyoke-archive now removes hashed permission-cache files.
notes: Wrote cmd-scope artifacts to .bug-hunter/domains/cmd-findings.json, cmd-skeptic.json, cmd-referee.json, and cmd-fix-report.json.
Updated .bug-hunter/sdk-loop-state-runner3.json to mark the cmd domain completed while leaving other domains pending.
A full ./cmd/goyoke-permission-gate test run was not used because sandboxed UDS listener tests fail with Unix-socket permission errors; the cache-focused verification passed.
